name: ames-ynab
description: YNAB (You Need A Budget) MCP connector built and maintained by Oliver Ames. Installing this plugin activates the ynab-mcp-server MCP, providing full read/write access to YNAB budgets, transactions, categories, scheduled transactions, and payees.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to YNAB budgets and transactions.
interface.longDescription: A YNAB MCP connector that gives Codex read and write access to budgets, transactions, categories, scheduled transactions, and payees. Requires YNAB_API_TOKEN environment variable.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my YNAB budget this month.
